title: Tiny Commands
description: Adds tiny versions of Minecraft commands (/day; /gm 1; /sun).
body: ![Tiny Commands: Tiny versions of Minecraft commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09cff6f630c85bb6a70ca98e16a905d102c2a8d3.png) # Tiny Commands **Completing various tasks will be faster, thanks to tiny versions of Minecraft commands.** For example, you no longer need to write _**/time set day**_, this action will replace by the command _**/day**_. ``` Note: This is a client-side mod. You do not need to install this on servers to use it. ``` --- ## 🕒 Time & Weather | Tiny commands | Standard commands | Description | | :---: | :---: | :---: | | **/day** | /time set day | Sets time to day | | **/night** | /time set night | Sets time to night | | **/noon** | /time set noon | Sets time to noon | | **/midnight** | /time set midnight | Sets time to midnight | | **/sun** \| **/wtr clear** \| **/wtr c** | /weather clear | Sets weather to clear | | **/rain** \| **/wtr rain** \| **/wtr r** | /weather rain | Sets weather to rain | | **/thunder** \| **/wtr thunder** \| **/wtr t** | /weather thunder | Sets weather to thunder | --- ## 🎮 Gameplay & Stats | Tiny commands | Standard commands | Description | | :---: | :---: | :---: | | **/gm 0** | /gamemode survival | Sets gamemode to survival | | **/gm 1** | /gamemode creative | Sets gamemode to creative | | **/gm 2** | /gamemode adventure | Sets gamemode to adventure | | **/gm 3** | /gamemode spectator | Sets gamemode to spectator | | **/diff p** \| **/diff peaceful** | /difficulty peaceful | Sets difficulty to peaceful | | **/diff e** \| **/diff easy** | /difficulty easy | Sets difficulty to easy | | **/diff n** \| **/diff normal** | /difficulty normal | Sets difficulty to normal | | **/diff h** \| **/diff hard** | /difficulty hard | Sets difficulty to hard | | **/sp** | /spawnpoint | Sets spawn point | | **/heal** | /effect give @s instant_health | Heals the player | | **/feed** | /effect give @s saturation | Feeds the player | | **/nv** | /effect give @s night_vision | Infinite Night Vision | | **/eclear** | /effect clear @s | Clears all effects | | **/tphere [player]** | /tp [player] @s | Teleports player to you | --- ## ⚙️ Gamerule Shortcuts | Tiny commands | Standard commands | | :---: | :---: | | **/gr keepinv [t/f]** | /gamerule keep_inventory [true/false] | | **/gr day [t/f]** | /gamerule advance_time [true/false] | | **/gr wtr [t/f]** | /gamerule advance_weather [true/false] | | **/gr pvp [t/f]** | /gamerule pvp [true/false] | | **/gr grief [t/f]** | /gamerule mob_griefing [true/false] | | **/gr rts [number]** | /gamerule random_tick_speed [number] | --- [![CurseForge](https://i.ibb.co/57rNyyy/image.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinycommands) [![Modrinth](https://i.ibb.co/TqwWmF06/1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinycommands)
